title: erigeron wellsii
intro: Erigeron wellsii, also known as Wells' daisy, is a flowering plant native to the western United States. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and calm respiratory problems. The medicinal properties of Erigeron wellsii are attributed to its ability to relax muscles, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of the common cold. The plant is often prepared for medicinal use in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its health benefits and alleviate a range of health issues.
